# Boat Cybertruck
![Requires](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/dqf94vyckp50yw0ohxsu4/r.png?rlkey=1w29drk0cgo454dh301cafwj9&st=oujarwn7&raw=1)[![ETF](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ws960ahfkhfqnrsqkcilv/et.png?rlkey=w8fujlhdtt9tn57trnqkgi039&st=8hm018ks&raw=1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)![Plus](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/sw5siw0xwrg7prx9mb192/plus.png?rlkey=0pavr0l7p8vkwrdcyi56lqoir&st=l9w7s020&raw=1)[![EMF](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/prngjz65opz5l54kfy39z/e.png?rlkey=harnv3pqnasrdl3a3bk47s205&st=umph0hff&raw=1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [![OptiFine](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/thfwderk9tgm9yzq281jx/optifine.jpg?rlkey=l89bglqjt5ixh9lqj1unk547a&raw=1)](https://optifine.net/downloads)  

Replace the Minecraft boat with a Cybertruck-style design.  
This is an unofficial project.

**Requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to support custom models.**
